message:
fix(core): normalize RNA U→T in anomaly scanner preprocessing

The regex [^ACGT] was replacing U with N, causing all k-mers in RNA
sequences to be skipped. WASM/JS dense counters correctly treat U as T,
so preprocessing must match: U→T, then non-ACGT→N.

Added test to verify RNA and DNA sequences produce identical results.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
